scenarios.title: Data Orchestration and Parallel Computing
scenarios.when_to_read: Workflow engines, DAGs, assets, Snakefiles, lazy/parallel task graphs, distributed arrays/dataframes, feature stores, cloud compute orchestration, and production data pipelines.
scenarios.role: Use when working with Dagster OSS: assets, jobs, Definitions, config/resources, schedules/sensors, automation, CLI/local development, deployment operations, GraphQL/webserver, Pipes external processes, components/projects.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `dagster` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: asset definitions, automation schedules sensors, cli local development, components projects, configuration resources, and 4 other focused workflows.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `dagster` when the request names `dagster`, centers on Use when working with Dagster OSS: assets, jobs, Definitions, config/resources, schedules/sensors, automation, CLI/local development, deployment operations, GraphQL/webserver, Pipes external processes, components/projects, or editing the Dagster repository itself, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in data orchestration and parallel computing. Then route to asset definitions, automation schedules sensors, CLI local development, or components projects when those focused workflows match.
